name: BEASLEY BROADCAST GROUP INC
summary: Beasley Broadcast Group, Inc. is a multi-platform media company primarily operating radio stations across the United States. The company owns and operates stations in 12 markets including Boston, Philadelphia, Detroit, Charlotte, Las Vegas, and Tampa-Saint Petersburg. It offers local and national advertisers integrated marketing solutions across audio, digital, and event platforms, generating revenue primarily through sale of advertising time and digital advertising solutions.
